sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35277" key="e)/ndorxis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνδορχις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n35277.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with concealed testicles</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">162</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
